es.name: Calculadora de Salario Neto
es.desc: Calcula tu salario neto anual y mensual tras IRPF y Seguridad Social.
es.description: Calcula tu salario neto anual y mensual tras IRPF y Seguridad Social.
es.seo_title: Calculadora de Salario Neto – IRPF y SS Online
es.seo_description: Calcula tu salario neto en España. Introduce el bruto anual, el IRPF y la cotización SS para obtener el neto mensual. Introduce tus valores y obtiene.
es.example_label: Calculating take-home pay for €42,000 gross annual salary with 22% IRPF and 6.35% social security.
es.result_context: Your neto_anual of {neto_anual} is annual take-home pay. The neto_mensual of {neto_mensual} shows monthly income after deductions.
mistakes: Using flat tax rate instead of progressive tax brackets
Forgetting additional deductions like union fees or insurance
Not accounting for tax credits or allowances that reduce IRPF
